title: DevStories Configuration
description: Configuration for DevStories VS Code extension

version.description: Configuration schema version (integer for legacy configs, semver string for current)

idMode.description: ID generation mode: 'auto' generates sequential IDs, 'manual' requires user input

story.description: Prefix for story IDs (e.g., DS, STORY)

idPrefix.description: ID prefixes for epics, stories, and tasks

isCompletion.description: When true, stories with this status count as completed in progress calculations. If no status has this flag, the last status in the array is used.

isExcluded.description: When true, stories with this status are excluded from burndown calculations (e.g., cancelled, deferred).

canArchive.description: When true, epics and themes with this status are eligible for archiving. Stories use isCompletion for archive eligibility instead.

current.description: Current active sprint name (must exist in sequence if sequence is defined)

length.description: Number of days in each sprint (used for burndown charts)

firstSprintStartDate.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the first sprint in the sequence (used to derive all sprint date ranges)

storypoints.description: Story point values parallel to sizes array (index-aligned). Used for progress calculation in the status bar.

defaultToCurrentSprint.description: When true, quick captures use current sprint; when false, they go to backlog

autoFilterCurrentSprint.description: When true, automatically filter to current sprint on extension load

enabled.description: When true, maintains a hierarchy of document folders mirroring the breakdown tree view

root.description: Root folder for storydocs, relative to the repository root (e.g., 'docs/storydocs')

storydocs.description: StoryDocs: hierarchical document folders mirroring the breakdown tree view

template.description: Template filename (with .template.md suffix) for this story type

description.description: Human-readable description shown in QuickPick and hover

icon.description: VS Code codicon name for tree view (e.g., 'lightbulb', 'bug')

storyTypes.description: Mapping of story type ID to type configuration (template, description, icon, emoji)

additionalProperties.description: Template filename (with .template.md suffix) for this task type

taskTypes.description: Mapping of task type ID to template filename (e.g., { "code": "code.template.md" })

storyTemplateRoot.description: Root folder for story templates, relative to the repository root. Defaults to .devstories/templates if not set.

taskTemplateRoot.description: Root folder for task templates, relative to the repository root. Defaults to .devstories/templates if not set.

devstories.description: Subdirectory name inside .devstories/ for soft-archived files (default: archive)

storydocs.description: Subdirectory name inside storydocs root for soft-archived docs (default: archive)

soft.description: Soft archive paths — files remain visible in the tree with an (archived) indicator

devstories.description: Subdirectory name inside .devstories/ for glacierd files (default: glacier)

storydocs.description: Subdirectory name inside storydocs root for glacierd docs (default: glacier)

hard.description: Hard archive paths — files are excluded from the tree view (Phase 2)

archive.description: Archive configuration for soft and hard archiving of completed sprints
